proposal.location: idea-engine control/outbox.md @ main 5f8a94e (landed via idea-engine PR #343)
proposal.claim: idea-engine PR #345 · control/claims/2026-07-13-verdict-056.md · work branch claude/verdict-056-snapshot-stale-sim

harvest_source.sentence_cadence_verbatim: **Cadence**: the bot pushes a fresh snapshot into the read relay periodically — target every **60 s** — plus on-demand refreshes when the owner or a workflow requests one.
harvest_source.sentence_staleness_verbatim: **Staleness**: consumers compare `generated_at` to now. Beyond a staleness threshold (default suggestion: 3 missed cycles ≈ 180 s), the frontend shows a stale indicator next to the snapshot metadata instead of presenting old numbers as live.
harvest_source.note: citation only — the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; source clone-verified this session at exactly that HEAD

hermeticity_note: every constant below is copied VERBATIM from the idea doc / PROPOSAL 045 block; the runner reads ONLY this file - zero repo/network reads at run time

model.time_unit: integer seconds throughout; all probabilities exact rationals
model.producer: push ATTEMPTS spaced I ~ uniform integer {interval_lo..interval_hi}; each attempt independently FAILS with probability f; a success stamps generated_at = the attempt instant; inter-success gap G = sum_{i=1..N} I_i with P(N = n) = f^(n-1)(1-f), n >= 1
model.viewer: loads at a uniformly random instant in producer steady state; perceived age = A + c, c ~ uniform integer {c_lo..c_hi}
model.indicator_rule: show STALE iff perceived age A + c > T, STRICT (perceived age EXACTLY T is LIVE) — pinned
model.outage: clean halt at a uniformly random healthy instant; per-viewer detection latency L(T) = max(0, T - A - c)
model.falsestale_definition: FALSESTALE(T) = P(A + c > T | healthy) — by renewal-reward, FALSESTALE(T) = E_c[ E[(G - (T - c))+] ] / E[G] (the registered computational definition; the decision rides it)
model.lat_definition: LAT(T) = E[L(T)] over the stationary age at the halt and c; stationary age pmf P(A = a) = P(G > a)/E[G] (registered)
model.indicator_equivalence_note: conformance derivation, disclosed: the registered renewal-reward numerator E[(G - x)+] equals Sum_{a>=x} P(G > a) = P(A >= x) on the integer floor-age lattice — exactly P(A_real + c > T) STRICT when the viewer instant is uniform REAL (the registration's 'uniformly random instant') and A_real >= x has the integer floor-age >= x a.s. (the boundary atom perceived-age == T has measure zero in real time). Arm S therefore counts STALE iff floor_age + c >= T, which IS the registered strict rule under real-instant sampling and reproduces the registered Arm-A formula with no off-by-one. The integer-strict variant count (floor_age + c > T) is committed alongside in results.json, reporting-only.
model.lat_age_convention_note: LAT uses the registered FLOOR-age pmf P(A = a) = P(G > a)/E[G] verbatim (the zero-disturbance identity LAT(T) = T - 59/2 pins this convention)

decision_rule.feasible_set: Feas = {T in grid : FALSESTALE(T) <= 1/200 AND LAT(T) <= 240}; T* = min Feas (undefined iff Feas empty)
decision_rule.evaluation_order: REJECT FIRST, then APPROVE, else NULL
decision_rule.REJECT: Feas = {} — 'a client-side age threshold cannot be made honest at the pinned cadence — the staleness leg needs a producer-side health signal, not a bigger number'
decision_rule.APPROVE: 180 in Feas AND Feas intersect {90, 120} = {} AND the seed-20261318 stability leg reproduces the ruling (150 in Feas does NOT defeat it; a full cheaper CYCLE would). Both conjuncts on Arm-A exact numbers.
NULL_axes: (i) under-provisioned — Feas nonempty but 180 not in Feas
(iii) arm disagreement — the agreement gate fails (no ruling issues)
(iv) sensitivity straddle — a reporting-only sensitivity pair lands a primary conjunct on the opposite side of a band edge (named axis; reporting legs CANNOT flip the decision)
decision_rule.stability_reproduction_pin: the stability leg reproduces the ruling iff the decision class derived from the Arm-S stability estimates under the same bands and evaluation order (sans the stability conjunct itself) equals the Arm-A class, through both twin evaluators — the V055 own-median precedent shape; the hard 1/1000 + 5 s agreement gate is registered against the n=200,000 main confirmation leg (its '>= 8 SE headroom at n = 200,000' clause) and binds THAT leg

arm_a.method: seedless exact enumeration: gap pmf = geometric mixture of n-fold convolutions of the interval lattice, exact for n <= tail_cutoff_n with the n > tail_cutoff_n tail in closed form (every such term has S_n > every evaluated x, so it contributes E_interval_mean*n - x exactly via geometric sums); exact fractions.Fraction end to end, no RNG; the ruling rides Arm A alone
arm_a.tail_cutoff_rule: smallest m with m*interval_lo > x_max where x_max = max(T) + |c|_max evaluated in that world (primary: 8*55 = 440 > 390 = 360 + 30, the registered closure); sensitivity worlds recompute m by the same rule
arm_a.tail_closure_spot_check: direct enumeration extended to n <= 12 must reproduce the n <= 8 + analytic-tail FALSESTALE numerators EXACTLY on the pinned sub-grid T in {90, 240} x c in {-30, 0, +30} — hard gate, exact equality

arm_s.method: seeded timeline MC: founding success pinned at t = 0 (no draws), then per attempt: interval draw I = interval_lo + randrange(span) THEN fail-bit draw (randrange(fail_den) < fail_num), timeline generated until t >= warmup + horizon; then viewer samples (instant t = randrange(warmup, warmup + horizon) THEN offset c = c_lo + randrange(c_span)); then halt samples (same two-draw shape); COMMON RANDOM NUMBERS across the whole T grid; age lookups by bisection over the success timeline; floor_age = t - last_success_at_or_before_t

stability.role: must reproduce the Arm-A ruling for any APPROVE (fresh timeline)

reporting.role: Arm-S confirmations of the sensitivity + burst legs, 20,000 samples each, scenarios sequential in the pinned order on ONE generator

aux.role: RESERVED - never read by any decision number, never even constructed (asserted); reserved for the named live probe's analysis

agreement_gate.applies_to: every FALSESTALE and LAT cell of the seed-20261317 main confirmation leg vs Arm A - any breach invalidates the run (NULL axis iii)

arm_s.draw_sentinel: per leg/scenario: exactly 2*attempts + 2*viewer_samples + 2*halt_samples randrange calls, attempts counted from the generated timeline
arm_s.reporting_horizon_note: the 1,000,000 s reporting/stability timeline length is an implementation pin (registration pins the sample counts and the stability timeline; the reporting timeline rides the same shape), disclosed

sensitivity_worlds.note: each varies ONE axis from primary; Arm A exact for all six + seed-20261319 Arm-S confirmations; REPORTING-ONLY — cannot flip the decision; straddle detection compares each world's primary-conjunct outcomes (Feas empty? 180 in Feas? Feas intersect {90,120} empty?) against the primary world

burst_leg.initial_state: ok at the founding success (warm-up absorbs mixing)
burst_leg.arm: Arm S ONLY, disclosed: the geometric closed form does not apply; direction stated by the registration: bursts lengthen gaps and push toward REJECT/NULL(i) — burstiness raises FALSESTALE at every T (direction check printed as a first-class anomaly line, reporting, never invalidating)
burst_leg.fail_bit_draws: prev fail: randrange(2) < 1; prev ok: randrange(48) < 1 (one draw per attempt either way)

zero_disturbance_identity.expected: G == 60; FALSESTALE(T) == 0 exactly for every grid T; stationary age uniform on {0..59}; LAT(T) == T - 59/2 exactly — exact values, not tolerances (hard gate, Arm A)

hand_fixture.expected: 120 - 100 - 30 = -10 -> L = 0 (already showing stale at the halt)

monotonicity_gate: FALSESTALE non-increasing and LAT non-decreasing in T — exact, both arms (a theorem under shared enumeration / common random numbers; any violation is an implementation defect): hard gate

reporting_only_outputs.P_L_gt_300: per T: P(L > 300) — L = max(0, T - A - c) <= T - c_lo, so zero is guaranteed exactly where T - c_lo <= 300 (grid T <= 240 at the primary c_lo = -30); positive where T - A - c can exceed 300 (amended pre-run from an over-strong 'T <= 300' descriptive note — reporting-output description only, no registered constant touched; disclosed in REPORT.md)
reporting_only_outputs.per_c_splits: per-c FALSESTALE/LAT at the decision cell T = 180 for every c, plus the c in {-30, 0, +30} split across the full T grid
reporting_only_outputs.integer_strict_variant: Arm-S count with the integer-strict indicator floor_age + c > T, committed alongside (see indicator_equivalence_note)

seed_registry_note: seeds 20261317-20261320 strictly above the P044/V055 high-water 20261316; new registry high-water 20261320
twin_evaluators: two independently written decision evaluators — Fraction comparisons vs pure-integer cross-multiplication — each derives Feas, T*, class, and NULL axis; must agree on main AND stability inputs (hard gate)
byte_identity: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs by external diff; no wall-clock in any output; CPython minor pinned and asserted
